content.content: German professional wrestler who is known for competing in the SmackDown series in the WWE. He is also known for being a former NXT Tag Team Champion. He later worked under the name Axel Axeman Tischer in the German Wrestling Federation. He first began his training in wrestling at the age of thirteen in Dresden. He competed in the independent circuit throughout Germany and Europe before settling in at the WWE Performance Center in April of 2015. He made his television debut in NXT in July of 2015. He has won several accomplishments for his wrestling including the wXw Shotgun Championship and the wXw Unified World Wrestling Championship. His wrestling fame has led him to amass over 60,000 followers on Instagram. He was born and raised in Dresden, Saxony, East Germany. He was awarded the NXT Tag Team Championship withEric Youngin 2017.
